case_title: OSAMA EMARA VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125) SERVED OCT-18-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO JAN-28TH HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY EMARA, OSAMA AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. DEFENDNAT TO TIMELY FILE ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-21-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OSAMA EMARA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY AMBER OTT, LOAN VERIFICATION CONSULTANT IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL HAS BEEN IN CONTACT WITH PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY HIM THAT DEFENDANT WOULD BE SEEKING A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO TIMLY SUBMIT ZOOM REQUEST APPERANCE. DEFENDANT ALSO REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT PARTIES ARE IN COMMUNICATION IN REGARDS TO A POSSIBLE RESOLUTION TO THIS MATTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AMBER OTT TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF WELLS FARGO FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
